QF.id: VII Other Services Provided by Brokers_5

question.text: Valid IPO offers placed in the stock exchange system remain outstanding till:

answer.text: The last day of the book building process
The end of each trading day

explanation.text: **The Logic:** All offers placed in the system remain outstanding till the last day of the book building process. **The Trap:** Unlike regular stock orders, IPO bids persist throughout the book building period. **Cross-Exam Context:** This differs from regular market orders which may lapse daily. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Trading Members can modify/cancel offers from start till last day within SEBI guidelines.
